executive_summary: The Iran-US conflict has entered a critical new phase with the war now spreading across multiple fronts. Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei is confirmed dead, three US troops have been killed, and Hezbollah has formally entered the conflict launching attacks on Israel from Lebanon. The Strait of Hormuz is effectively closed following IRGC strikes on Western tankers, while Bahrain and Kuwait have been directly targeted. Over 1,000 US strikes on Iranian targets have been conducted, and Israeli attacks have killed over 180 children at a girls' school in Iran.
whats_new: Hezbollah formally declares war on Israel, launching rockets and drones at Haifa in retaliation for Khamenei's killing — opening a new front from Lebanon
IRGC claims strikes on 3 US/UK oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz, escalating threat to global energy shipping
Bahrain reports Iranian attack on offshore facility near Salman Port — targeting key US Gulf ally
Israeli airstrike on girls' school in Minab, Iran kills approximately 180 children (UNESCO condemns attack)
Kuwait activates air raid sirens; first Iranian missile attacks on Kuwaiti territory reported
US officials fear potential suicide attacks in Tel Aviv and Jerusalem as retaliation threat
Israeli forces strike Beirut southern suburbs (Hezbollah stronghold) following Hezbollah attacks
confirmed_events: Khamenei confirmed dead — Iran declares 40-day mourning, power vacuum at top of Iranian command structure
Three US troops killed, five wounded in Iranian retaliatory strikes on US bases in Iraq/Syria region — first direct US casualties
UK authorizes US use of British bases for strikes on Iranian missile capabilities — direct European military involvement
Strait of Hormuz effectively closed — IRGC controls shipping lanes, global oil supply severely disrupted
Iran launched 9th wave of ballistic missiles targeting Israeli cities (Tel Aviv, Haifa, Jerusalem) — dozens killed in Israel
unverified_emerging: Israeli denial of striking girls' school in Minab — Iran claims 180 killed, US/Israel 'not aware' of such strike (source: Israeli military statement)
Dugin (Putin-linked strategist) warns of World War 3 if Iran falls — signals potential Russian involvement (source: Hindustan Times)
US intelligence fears suicide attacks on American soil as retaliation — unconfirmed threat assessment (source: Israel media citing US officials)
Reports of Israeli/US attacks on Tabriz in northwestern Iran — expanding strike geography (source: Israeli media)

people_travel: Cathay Pacific suspends Hong Kong-Dubai flights until Thursday, Hong Kong-Riyadh until Tuesday — 37 flights affected
Dubai and Abu Dhabi stock exchanges closed for two days — unprecedented market shutdown
Air raid sirens activated in Kuwait — civilian population under missile threat
supply_chain: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed — global oil supply chain severely disrupted, $82/barrel (14-month high)
IRGC strikes on tankers in Hormuz further threaten maritime shipping routes
Gulf ports under missile attack — Salman Port (Bahrain), potential further port disruptions
market_macro: Oil prices surge 13% to $82/barrel — highest in 14 months
Dubai/Abu Dhabi stock markets suspend trading for two days
Emirati and Kuwaiti stock markets close amid escalating crisis

outlook_24_72h.base_case: The conflict will continue escalating over the next 24-72 hours. With Khamenei's death, Iran is likely to authorize even more aggressive retaliatory strikes through the IRGC, while Hezbollah's formal entry adds a significant new front. US and Israeli forces will continue strikes on Iranian territory, with the 1,000+ targets already hit expanding. The Strait of Hormuz closure will persist, maintaining severe oil supply disruptions. Civilian casualties on both sides (particularly the school attack) may further radicalize Iranian public opinion and harden negotiating positions.
escalation_risks: Russian direct intervention — Dugin's WW3 warning signals Kremlin may feel compelled to act if Iran collapses
Iranian attacks on Gulf states could widen conflict to include Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar
US domestic political pressure — poll shows Americans overwhelmingly oppose Iran war, may constrain Trump
Potential Iranian suicide attacks on Israeli or US targets outside the region
Hezbollah opening full-scale front with Israel could trigger Israeli invasion of Lebanon
outlook_24_72h.de_escalation_pathways: No clear de-escalation pathways visible. Trump offered Iranian forces ultimatum to surrender weapons for immunity — Tehran rejected. Iran insists it will exercise 'no limit' to self-defense. The power vacuum from Khamenei's death makes internal Iranian decision-making uncertain. US officials themselves skeptical that regime change will occur. International mediation unlikely given the intensity of strikes and civilian casualties on both sides. The conflict may grind on for weeks as Trump suggested, with neither side able to claim decisive victory.
